title: bouteloua parryi
intro: Bouteloua parryi, also known as Blue Grama Grass, is a perennial grass native to the Great Plains region of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its rich content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, Bouteloua parryi is typically dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
